recommendations.title: This Is the End
recommendations.overview: While attending a party at James Franco's house, Seth Rogen, Jay Baruchel and many other celebrities are faced with the apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Team America: World Police

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secrets of the Scroll
recommendations.overview: As Po looks for his lost action figures, the story of how the panda inadvertently helped create the Furious Five is told.

recommendations.title: Steel Rain
recommendations.overview: Amid a coup, a North Korean agent escapes south with the country's injured leader in an attempt to keep him alive and prevent a Korean war.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda

recommendations.title: The Disaster Artist
recommendations.overview: An aspiring actor in Hollywood meets an enigmatic stranger by the name of Tommy Wiseau, the meeting leads the actor down a path nobody could have predicted; creating the worst movie ever made.

recommendations.title: The Spiderwick Chronicles
recommendations.overview: Upon moving into the run-down Spiderwick Estate with their mother, twin brothers Jared and Simon Grace, along with their sister Mallory, find themselves pulled into an alternate world full of faeries and other creatures.
